rule_metadata.author: Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Vice Society Encrypted File Extension File Creation

rules.rule_text:
title: Vice Society Encrypted File Extension File Creation
id: ba85a1ba-a194-4f03-9064-0c53da092698
status: experimental
description: Detects creation of potentially-encrypted files by Vice Society ransomeware.
  As this is based only on file extensions, the analyst should investigate surrounding
  activity to validate that this is not part of a benign applicatoin.
references:
- https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/security/blog/2022/10/25/dev-0832-vice-society-opportunistic-ransomware-campaigns-impacting-us-education-sector/
- https://www.cisa.gov/uscert/ncas/alerts/aa22-249a
author: Micah Babinski
date: 2022/11/26
tags:
- attack.impact
- attack.t1486
logsource:
  category: file_event
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    TargetFilename|endswith:
    - .locked
    - .vs0ciety
    - .v-society
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
